About the Clinic

Dermatology Led
Skin Care Since 2020

Led by Dr. Ragini Naik (D.D.V) — Dermatologist, Trichologist & Cosmetologist Ragini's Derma Clinic is a structured skin and aesthetic clinic in Gokhalenagar, Pune. Every treatment is delivered in a hygienic, appointment-based environment, ensuring personalised care and consistent results.

From acne and pigmentation correction to advanced laser procedures and anti-aging treatments, the clinic brings focused dermatological expertise to every consultation.

LASER & PEELS
DERMATOLOGY-FIRST
EST. 2020
Clinical Environment
Hygienic setup designed for safe skin procedures
Advanced Technology
Laser and chemical peel treatment capabilities
Expert Care
Dermatologist-supervised protocols for every treatment
Affordable Access
Premium dermatology at accessible, transparent pricing
Our Treatments

Clinical Treatment
Catalogue

All treatments are structured around clinical dermatology outcomes. Skin correction and active procedures are our primary focus aesthetic and wellness services complement the clinical offering.

Discuss Your Skin Concern →
Clinical
Dermatology Consultation
A thorough clinical skin assessment by a qualified dermatologist. Skin type analysis, condition diagnosis, and personalised treatment planning.
Book →
Dermatology
Acne Treatment
Evidence-based acne management combining topical therapy, in-clinic procedures, and long-term maintenance protocols for clear skin.
Book →
Clinical
Advanced Skin Procedures
Targeted interventions including milia removal, skin tag treatments, and other clinical aesthetic procedures performed under controlled conditions.
Book →
Clinical
Pigmentation & Melasma
Targeted treatment for pigmentation, melasma and uneven skin tone using advanced techniques.
Book →
Clinical
Fungal Infection Treatment
Medical treatment for fungal infections affecting skin, nails and scalp.
Book →
Clinical
Scar Treatment
Effective scar reduction for acne scars, surgical scars and stretch marks.
Book →
Clinical
Vitiligo Treatment
Specialised dermatological treatment and management for vitiligo patients.
Book →
Clinical
Psoriasis & Eczema
Clinical management of psoriasis, eczema and other chronic skin conditions.
Book →
Clinical
Open Pores Treatment
Advanced treatment to minimise enlarged pores and refine skin texture.
Book →
Advanced
Chemical Peel Treatments
Controlled chemical exfoliation to address pigmentation, uneven texture, acne scars, and early signs of aging. Supervised and calibrated to skin type.
Book →
Advanced
Laser Treatments
Targeted laser procedures for hair reduction, pigmentation correction, skin resurfacing, and vascular conditions — precise and clinically monitored.
Book →
Anti-Aging
Microneedling
Collagen induction therapy to reduce fine lines, scars and improve skin texture.
Book →
Aesthetic
Anti-Aging Treatments
Non-surgical aesthetic procedures to address fine lines, loss of firmness, and skin dullness. Clinically guided for natural, gradual improvement.
Book →
Skin Care
HydraFacial
A multi-step clinical facial combining deep cleansing, exfoliation, extraction, and hydration infusion. Immediate results, no downtime.
Book →
Aesthetic
Professional Facials
Clinically structured facial treatments tailored for specific skin needs brightening, deep cleansing, hydration, and skin barrier repair.
Book →
Aesthetic
BB Glow + All Facials
BB Glow treatment for instant brightening along with a full range of professional facials.
Book →
Aesthetic
Fillers (Lip & Skin)
Safe dermal filler treatments for lip enhancement and skin volumisation.
Book →
Aesthetic
Detan Treatment
Face and body detan to remove tan, brighten skin and restore natural complexion.
Book →
Aesthetic
Eyebrow Needling
Eyebrow enhancement using needling techniques for fuller, well-defined brows.
Book →
Trichology
Hair Loss Treatment
Advanced treatment for hair fall, thinning and scalp health by a certified trichologist.
Book →
Trichology
Scalp Cleaning & Dandruff
Deep scalp cleansing to remove buildup, reduce dandruff and restore scalp health.
Book →
Trichology
Keratin Treatment
Professional keratin smoothening for frizz-free, lustrous and manageable hair.
Book →
Wellness
Head Massage & Wellness
Therapeutic scalp and head massage for relaxation, stress relief, and scalp health - a calming complement to your clinical visit.
Book →
Wellness
Weight Loss Program
Medically supervised weight loss program tailored to your body type and health goals.
Book →
